description: Test __baml__() returns JSON-like data consistent with BamlType::to_baml_value. Test nested sample round-trips via try_from_baml_value. Test __rlm_schema__() returns dict with field type + description.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan-derived test focus: `__baml__` round‑trip.
- For an `#[rlm_type]` struct, call `__baml__()` in Python and ensure it matches `BamlType::to_baml_value` shape.
- Round-trip via `BamlValue::try_from` or `try_from_baml_value` in Rust.
- Ensure nested structs/enums/Option/Vec behave (dict/list/None/primitive).

title: Task 7.3: Test __baml__ round-trip
